+ EvolutionChainResponse

→ Gson.toJson → insert

span.p:
syncAll()
1. fetch /pokemon/ list if empty
2. for each uncached id:
parallel (Semaphore=40)
fetch detail + species + evo
3. write to pokemon_detail_cache

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
syncTeamMoves(teamIds)
4. for each team member:
top-4 level-up moves
→ getMove(name) for each
→ write to moves table
